metadata.description: 2026 KenPom college basketball team ratings and strength of schedule metrics

columns.name: rank
columns.description: Overall KenPom national ranking based on Adjusted Efficiency Margin

columns.name: team
columns.description: College basketball team name

columns.name: conf
columns.description: Athletic conference the team belongs to (e.g., ACC, B10, SEC, B12)

columns.name: record
columns.description: Team's overall win-loss record for the season

columns.name: adj_em
columns.description: Adjusted Efficiency Margin — difference between a team's adjusted offensive and defensive efficiency; the primary KenPom power rating

columns.name: adj_o
columns.description: Adjusted Offensive Efficiency — points scored per 100 possessions, adjusted for opponent strength

columns.name: adj_o_rank
columns.description: National rank for Adjusted Offensive Efficiency

columns.name: adj_d
columns.description: Adjusted Defensive Efficiency — points allowed per 100 possessions, adjusted for opponent strength (lower is better)

columns.name: adj_d_rank
columns.description: National rank for Adjusted Defensive Efficiency

columns.name: adj_t
columns.description: Adjusted Tempo — estimated possessions per 40 minutes, adjusted for opponent pace

columns.name: adj_t_rank
columns.description: National rank for Adjusted Tempo

columns.name: luck
columns.description: Luck rating — how much better or worse a team performed relative to what their efficiency numbers predict; adjusts for close-game outcomes

columns.name: luck_rank
columns.description: National rank for Luck rating

columns.name: sos_adj_em
columns.description: Strength of Schedule — average Adjusted Efficiency Margin of all opponents faced (higher = tougher schedule)

columns.name: sos_adj_em_rank
columns.description: National rank for Strength of Schedule (Adjusted Efficiency Margin)

columns.name: sos_opp_o
columns.description: Strength of Schedule — average Adjusted Offensive Efficiency of opponents faced

columns.name: sos_opp_o_rank
columns.description: National rank for SOS Opponent Offensive Efficiency

columns.name: sos_opp_d
columns.description: Strength of Schedule — average Adjusted Defensive Efficiency of opponents faced

columns.name: sos_opp_d_rank
columns.description: National rank for SOS Opponent Defensive Efficiency

columns.name: ncsos_adj_em
columns.description: Non-Conference Strength of Schedule — average Adjusted Efficiency Margin of non-conference opponents only

columns.name: ncsos_adj_em_rank
columns.description: National rank for Non-Conference Strength of Schedule
